about_item: LIVE GPS + LTE PET TRACKER: Track your pet in real time, even in remote areas, with advanced GPS and LTE-M technology. It’s the perfect dog tracker and cat tracker for pets who love to explore. Plus, it’s a great Christmas and holiday gift for pet parents—one of those cat and dog Christmas gifts that keep on giving.

ESCAPE ALERTS: Custom build a geofence so your GPS pet collar sends instant alerts to your phone using the Fi app if your pet strays from a designated safe zone. Whether it’s a front door dash or back gate slip-out, you’ll be notified immediately—so you can act fast and bring them home safely.

VERSATILE AND STYLISH: This sleek GPS pet tracker fits most collars and harnesses up to 1.25” wide. The low-profile slip-on style adds high-tech function without sacrificing your pet’s look. It’s a GPS pet tracker that’s as fashionable as it is functional—the perfect stylish Christmas present for cat and dog parents.
SMALLER DESIGN: 80% lighter than Fi Series 3+, the Fi Mini is the ideal small GPS pet tracker—offering a comfortable fit for pets of all sizes without compromising on tracking power.

BUILT FOR ADVENTURE: Rain, mud, cold Holiday weather or wild trails—this cat and dog tracking tracker is made to handle it all. With its waterproof (IP68-rated), rugged construction, the Fi Mini is built tough for any pet lifestyle.

summary.text: Customers find the GPS tracker accurate and appreciate its small size, lightweight design, and exceptional battery life. The device provides useful tracking information, with one customer noting it shows local map locations on their phone, and customers say it gives them peace of mind. The functionality receives mixed reviews, with some saying it works perfectly while others report it doesn't work well. Additionally, connectivity issues are reported, with customers mentioning the device disconnects for 10-20 minutes at a time.

authors_reviews.title: Lightweight Tracker With a Great App
authors_reviews.text: The Fi Mini has been a great addition for keeping tabs on my dog. It’s small, lightweight, and doesn’t bother them at all, which is a big plus. The app is very user‑friendly — easy to navigate, quick to update, and packed with useful tracking and health features. The rechargeable design is convenient and saves money over time.The only downside for me is the collar holder. It works, but it’s not as protective or secure as I’d prefer, especially for active dogs.Overall, it’s a solid, reliable tracker with great features in a compact size.
authors_reviews.author: Eric

authors_reviews.title: It just works!!!
authors_reviews.text: I am not a big “reviewer” unless something is a total bust or really great. In this case, the Fi Mini is really great. It fits great on our 7 pound Chihuahua puppy. I was worried that anything would be too big, but this is not the case. It works perfectly and the iPhone app is easy to use. I made a safe zone around our home and as soon as it leaves that zone we get a notification. The app provides great metrics on Pedro’s activity including sleep, drinking, and activity. It also provides a place to upload vet information and shot records. Really a total package and highly recommended.
authors_reviews.author: C Andrey

authors_reviews.title: Surprisingly ineffective.
authors_reviews.text: Not what I expected. Did not work for our specific situation. The technology isn't quite there yet. Read on . . .Our indoor cat figured out how to use our doggie door. I thought this might at least help notify us when she left the house, or the yard, and let us know where she is so we could track her down. It doesn't. We set up our GeoFence as small as the app would allow, which in our case was still too big. I set the app Safe Zone as close as I could the the back door. I assumed that we'd be notified if she left the house and went into the yard. Nope.On numerous occasions the past week, she was in the yard and well beyond with ZERO app notification. I was watching her every move in the yard and was clearly out the designated area set on the app, by 30 - 40 yards. Yet as I write this review, I've received three notifications from the app that she's "on the move". The tracker is sitting on the counter in our kitchen. Go figure.My car's gps is dramatically more accurate than this thing, which is why I made the incorrect assumption that this would be accurate as well. In theory, this is a great idea, but in practice, it ain't all that.The number of positive reviews surprise me as this was one reason we decided to try this product. It might be great if you have an outdoor cat and want to know where to find it if it's a few blocks or miles away. If you're trying to keep your cat from wandering away from your house or yard, look elsewhere. Returning it today.
authors_reviews.author: ZoesDad

authors_reviews.title: Great tracker!
authors_reviews.text: This is a nice tracker. Great size for our miniature schnauzer. The battery life is fantastic (almost two weeks!) and the software interface is great with lots of information
authors_reviews.author: Jennifer Edgell

authors_reviews.title: Glad I purchased this!
authors_reviews.text: I got this for my miniature schnauzer that weighs about 9-10 pounds. It fit on her current collar nicely (which is a thin collar). The battery lasts about a week or a little longer. It is easy to charge and doesn't take too long; I just do it at night when I know she will be indoors. She likes to bolt when the door opens and sometimes, she was so quick, we hadn't noticed it. That was the purpose of me getting the Fi. It did track her leaving the house one day and I let my husband know that it alerted me. She actually came back home before I had noticed she was gone. It seems to function the way it is supposed to. I originally set up her "safe zone" as our entire yard - to include the front and side yard that are outside of the fence. I may go back and change that to include only the part of the yard that is in the fence so that we get notifications a little quicker. I originally had ordered the Fi Series 3, but the collar was too small to fit around her neck and the tracker and collar seemed heavy for her as a smaller dog. It was an easy return on Amazon and I am much happier with the lighter Mini tracker - I am looking forward to when the software updates for barking, etc. get updated on the Mini. The price is reasonable for what you are receiving. I really looked around before I made the purchase and had even tried another product that I wasn't as happy with. I also tried air tags, but those have their limits. Fi makes it fun to see how she compares to other dogs in my city and my state. I added my children to the app so that they can help find her too if she gets out. It is the item you never want to use but will be happy when you need to and have it. I would purchase again.
authors_reviews.author: Just my 2 cents

authors_reviews.title: Must have!! Works Perfectly
authors_reviews.text: Works perfectly! No comparison to the Bluetooth version (air tag). Battery life is fantastic. Three weeks in and the battery is at 65%. My 10# Pomeranian doesn’t notice it at all, it’s so small and light.
authors_reviews.author: Thumpernator
